channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-2409] Interop 2.3<->2.4 Failure on test suite replay-single test_70b: kernel panic
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for sarah <sarah@whamcloud.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://maloo.whamcloud.com/test_sets/3d209190-3981-11e2-9fda-52540035b04c.

The sub-test test_70b failed with the following error:

test failed to respond and timed out

OST console log 

06:00:55:Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: == replay-single test 70b: mds recovery; 2 clients == 06:00:42 (1354024842)
06:00:55:Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl mark Started rundbench load pid=10236 ...
06:00:55:Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: Started rundbench load pid=10236 ...
06:01:36:skb_over_panic: text:ffffffffa0109de1 len:650 put:650 head:(null) data:(null) tail:0x28a end:0x0 dev:<NULL>
06:01:36:BUG: scheduling while atomic: ll_ost_io00_017/11630/0x10000100
06:01:36:Modules linked in: osd_ldiskfs(U) fsfilt_ldiskfs(U) ldiskfs(U) lustre(U) ofd(U) ost(U) cmm(U) mdt(U) mdd(U) mds(U) mgs(U) jbd2 obdecho(U) mgc(U) lquota(U) lov(U) osc(U) mdc(U) lmv(U) fid(U) fld(U) ptlrpc(U) obdclass(U) lvfs(U) ksocklnd(U) lnet(U) sha512_generic sha256_generic libcfs(U) nfs fscache nfsd lockd nfs_acl auth_rpcgss exportfs autofs4 sunrpc ib_ipoib rdma_ucm ib_ucm ib_uverbs ib_umad rdma_cm ib_cm iw_cm ib_addr ipv6 ib_sa ib_mad ib_core microcode virtio_balloon 8139too 8139cp mii i2c_piix4 i2c_core ext3 jbd mbcache virtio_blk virtio_pci virtio_ring virtio pata_acpi ata_generic ata_piix dm_mirror dm_region_hash dm_log dm_mod [last unloaded: speedstep_lib]
06:01:36:CPU 0 
06:01:36:Modules linked in: osd_ldiskfs(U) fsfilt_ldiskfs(U) ldiskfs(U) lustre(U) ofd(U) ost(U) cmm(U) mdt(U) mdd(U) mds(U) mgs(U) jbd2 obdecho(U) mgc(U) lquota(U) lov(U) osc(U) mdc(U) lmv(U) fid(U) fld(U) ptlrpc(U) obdclass(U) lvfs(U) ksocklnd(U) lnet(U) sha512_generic sha256_generic libcfs(U) nfs fscache nfsd lockd nfs_acl auth_rpcgss exportfs autofs4 sunrpc ib_ipoib rdma_ucm ib_ucm ib_uverbs ib_umad rdma_cm ib_cm iw_cm ib_addr ipv6 ib_sa ib_mad ib_core microcode virtio_balloon 8139too 8139cp mii i2c_piix4 i2c_core ext3 jbd mbcache virtio_blk virtio_pci virtio_ring virtio pata_acpi ata_generic ata_piix dm_mirror dm_region_hash dm_log dm_mod [last unloaded: speedstep_lib]
06:01:36:
06:01:37:Pid: 11630, comm: ll_ost_io00_017 Not tainted 2.6.32-279.5.1.el6_lustre.gb16fe80.x86_64 #1 Red Hat KVM
06:01:37:RIP: 0010:[<ffffffff8127e7f9>]  [<ffffffff8127e7f9>] memset+0x49/0xc0
06:01:37:RSP: 0018:ffff88007553f918  EFLAGS: 00000202
06:01:37:RAX: 0000000000000000 RBX: ffff88007553f9b0 RCX: 00000000000539c8

06:01:38:CS:  0010 DS: 0000 ES: 0000 CR0: 000000008005003b
06:01:39:CR2: 00007fb06dfe2000 CR3: 0000000037fa9000 CR4: 00000000000006f0
06:01:39:DR0: 0000000000000000 DR1: 0000000000000000 DR2: 0000000000000000
06:01:39:DR3: 0000000000000000 DR6: 00000000ffff0ff0 DR7: 0000000000000400

06:01:39: ffffffffa0e23e1e 0000000000000001 0000000000000001 ffff880070d6b000

06:01:39:Call Trace:
06:01:40: [<ffffffffa0e23e1e>] ? osd_write_prep+0x35e/0x420 [osd_ldiskfs]

item.environment:
server: 2.3 RHEL6
client: lustre-master build#1065 RHEL6
item.summary: Interop 2.3<->2.4 Failure on test suite replay-single test_70b: kernel panic

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment: duplicate of LU-2406
